---
title: "Notes"
page-layout: full
toc: false
number-sections: false
---

## Why This Section Exists

`Notes` is the reflective layer of the site.

It is where a topic stops being only curriculum and starts becoming commentary, synthesis, or reusable research taste.

This section is for:

- dated essays
- research notes
- commentary on papers
- synthesis posts connecting multiple topics

It should feel like a reflective layer on top of the main curriculum, not a replacement for it.

## Current Notes

::: {.card-grid}
::: {.feature-card}
### When a Topic Starts to Feel Reusable

A note about the gap between recognizing a topic and actually being able to reuse it while reading papers.

[Open the Note](when-a-topic-starts-to-feel-reusable.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
:::

::: {.feature-card}
### Use Notes After The Main Pass

Open this section after the underlying topic already feels stable enough to support reflection, synthesis, or paper-reading commentary.

[Browse Topics First](../topics/index.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
:::
:::

## How This Differs From Library Notes

[Library > Notes](../library/notes.qmd) points to external reference notes.

This section is for original site writing.
